nasb.text: He spoke another parable to them, “The kingdom of heaven is like leaven, which a woman took and hid in three pecks of flour until it was all leavened.”

esv.text: He told them another parable. “The kingdom of heaven is like leaven that a woman took and hid in three measures of flour, till it was all leavened.”

cnv.text: 他對他們講了另一個比喻：“天國好像麵酵，婦女拿去放在三斗麵裡，直到全團發起來。”

ccb.text: 祂又给他们讲了个比喻：“天国就像面酵，妇人拿来掺在三斗面里，使整盆面都发起来。”

csbs.text: 耶稣又对他们讲了另一个比喻：“天国好比酵母，一个妇人拿去拌在三斗面里，直到整团面都发了酵。”
